JHIN-BULLET.title: Bullets
JHIN-BULLET.description: Jhin's firing resource. Most shoot cards spend 1 Bullet; when Bullets reach 0, the magazine must be reloaded.
JHIN-FLOURISH.title: Flourish
JHIN-FLOURISH.description: Triggers when a shoot card truly spends the last Bullet. Flourish resolves that card's flourish effect and triggers related relic, skill, and Power effects.
JHIN-MARK.title: Mark
JHIN-MARK.description: When Jhin's next [gold]Shoot[/gold] card hits a marked enemy, it deals 3 additional damage per stack and removes all Mark. Non-shoot damage does not consume it.
JHIN-LOTUS_TRAP.title: Lotus Trap
JHIN-LOTUS_TRAP.description: Triggers and is removed after the enemy attacks. Each stack deals 6 damage and applies 1 Weak; if this damage kills, deal 4 damage to all enemies per stack.
JHIN-RELOAD.title: Reload
JHIN-RELOAD.description: Sets your [gold]Bullets[/gold] back to 4, and may trigger other reload-related effects.
